summary: Add focused component tests for refactored hotspots where logic was extracted
problem_statement: The Phase 5 decomposition restructured Admin, Dashboard, KanbanBoard, and EditTaskDialog into multiple modules. Without component tests, it is impossible to verify that the decomposition preserved behaviour. Focused tests on the refactored hotspots catch rendering regressions and validate that extracted logic integrates correctly with the UI.
in_scope: Write focused Vitest + React Testing Library component tests for decomposed Admin modules
Write focused component tests for decomposed Dashboard modules
Write focused component tests for decomposed KanbanBoard modules
Write focused component tests for decomposed EditTaskDialog modules
Test rendering, key user interactions, and prop-driven behaviour for each decomposed module
out_of_scope: Testing components not decomposed in Phase 5
Visual regression testing or screenshot comparisons
Full integration tests with a running server
requirements: Each decomposed hotspot has at least one component test verifying its primary rendering path
Tests validate that key user interactions (clicks, form submissions) trigger expected callbacks or state changes
Tests use Vitest and React Testing Library
Tests mock API calls and external dependencies appropriately
acceptance_criteria: Focused component tests exist for refactored UI hotspots where logic was moved or isolated
All tests pass via npm run test
Tests cover rendering and primary interaction paths for each hotspot
npm run check passes with no new type errors introduced
dependencies: P5-R2-13 through P5-R2-16 — component decomposition must be complete
P3-R2-08 — shared hooks must be available for mocking
risks: Components with complex drag-and-drop (KanbanBoard) or dialog interactions (EditTaskDialog) may require specialised test setup and event simulation
implementation_notes: Use @testing-library/react for rendering and interaction. Mock shared hooks (useStages, useSubStages) and the apiRequest wrapper in component tests. Focus on testing the decomposed pieces individually rather than the full composed view — integration of pieces is verified by the fact that the app still works.
